highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.148.0 is the first stable v4 release, built on Skia m148 with a reworked singleton lifecycle.
highlights_body: It carries everything from the 4.147 preview line — variable fonts, animated WebP encoding, SKSamplingOptions on surface draws — plus a rework of the singleton lifecycle, pixel-span fixes for SKPixmap/SKBitmap, and the promotion of long-obsolete SKPaint text/font members to compile errors. This is a breaking release — read the migration notes below before upgrading.

breaking.title: Legacy SKPaint text and font members are now compile errors
breaking.body: The paint text/font state members that were marked `[Obsolete]` in v3 are now errors, and the remaining pre-v4 obsoletes have been trimmed from the reference assembly. Move typeface, text size, hinting and text encoding onto `SKFont` (paired with the `SKCanvas.DrawText(..., SKFont, SKPaint)` overloads) before upgrading.

breaking.title: GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo renamed to GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo
breaking.body: The Vulkan YCbCr conversion info struct now follows the SkiaSharp `GR` casing convention. Update any reference and rebuild — the old name and its IEquatable/Equals/== operators are gone.

breaking.title: SKNativeObject.IgnorePublicDispose is now read-only
breaking.body: The `IgnorePublicDispose` property loses its protected setter — subclasses can no longer flip it at runtime. Set the value from the constructor path instead.

breaking.title: Singleton lifecycle rework
breaking.body: Process-wide singletons (default typefaces, font managers, ambient contexts) now have a documented lifecycle owned by the managed layer instead of ad-hoc native pinning. Consumers that were relying on singletons never being finalized should audit their disposal patterns.

breaking.title: Assembly version bumped to 4.x
breaking.body: SkiaSharp.dll now reports assembly version 4.148.0.0 (up from 3.119.0.0). Consumers with strong-name binding redirects or hard-coded version checks must be updated. Review the linked API-diff report before upgrading.

bullets.detail: The bundled engine moves from m132 through m147 and lands on m148, folding in two upstream chrome/m147 bug-fix sync merges along the way.

bullets.lead: Variable fonts and color font palettes
bullets.detail: Variable font support wires through SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp, and SKFont/SKTypeface gain color font palette selection and hardened variable-font handling.
Default typeface lookup moves to the managed layer (fixing #3693), and the Skia shim regains `sk_fontmgr_legacy_create_typeface` so downstream code depending on the legacy factory works again.
New overloads accept SKSamplingOptions so callers can pick the mipmap and filter mode for surface-to-surface draws.
Turn any seekable stream into an SKData without an intermediate byte[] copy.
SKWebpEncoder can now emit animated WebP files from a frame sequence, closing a long-standing gap next to the existing decoder.

bullets.lead: HBColor struct and missing HarfBuzz wrappers
bullets.detail: HarfBuzzSharp gets a proper `HBColor` struct matching `hb_color_t` and fills in wrappers that had been missing or mis-named.

bullets.lead: SKPixmap/SKBitmap pixel span uses row bytes and correct axis
bullets.detail: `GetPixelSpan` now honours `RowBytes` for stride, and `GetPixelSpan<T>(x, y)` computes the row offset from `Width` instead of `Height` — pixels read from non-tight bitmaps are now correct.

bullets.lead: SKPath finalizer crash when SKPathBuilder collected first
bullets.detail: A GC ordering bug that could crash on finalization when an SKPathBuilder was collected before the SKPath it produced is fixed.

bullets.lead: Android SKGLView blank after MAUI TabBar switch
bullets.detail: Switching tabs in a MAUI TabBar no longer leaves SKGLView blank; the GL surface is now correctly re-attached after the view is re-added to the tree.

bullets.lead: WinUI Projection DLL not found on .NET 9
bullets.detail: The WinUI Projection assembly is now packaged so .NET 9 consumers can load it without a `DllNotFoundException` at startup.
Process-wide singletons now have a documented lifecycle owned by the managed layer; disposal and finalization order are predictable across the object graph. See the breaking-changes note above.

bullets.lead: Native-compat gate moved to SkiaApi cctor
bullets.detail: The native-library compat check moves off `[ModuleInitializer]` onto the SkiaApi type constructor, running on first API use instead of at module load — this avoids AOT/trim edge cases and makes startup failures easier to diagnose.
Tizen picks up 64-bit native builds and Android-hosted Linux (`linux-bionic`) becomes a first-class native target.
Libraries target the versioned Apple TFMs (26.0) while sample apps use the unversioned ones, matching current .NET SDK guidance.
.NET 8 is now the floor for the SkiaSharp WASM runtime asset; older Emscripten native slices are removed.
libexpat 2.8.1, libpng 1.6.58, zlib 1.3.2.1-motley, freetype 2.14.3, libjpeg-turbo 3.1.4.1 and harfbuzz 14.2.0 all pick up their latest upstream security and bug fixes.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: The Skia m132/m147 bumps, variable font support end-to-end, the managed default-typeface fix, the SKPath finalizer crash fix, the SKPaint text/font obsolete-to-error promotion, and the singleton lifecycle rework
contributor_summaries.4Darmygeometry: Linux Bionic native assets and PolySharp-based C# 13 support on legacy TFMs
contributor_summaries.SimonvBez: Fixed SKGLView not rendering after MAUI TabBar tab switches on Android

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 opened the v4 line: Skia m132 → m133 → m147, variable fonts, color font palettes, SKSamplingOptions on surface draws, the managed default-typeface fix, Tizen x64/arm64, Linux Bionic, and dependency refreshes.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 added animated WebP encoding, zero-copy `SKStream.GetData()`, the SKPath finalizer crash fix, and the Apple TFM realignment.
preview_summaries.p3: Preview 3 finished the API pass with HBColor and missing HarfBuzz wrappers, dropped native WASM builds for pre-.NET 8 Emscripten, and picked up freetype, zlib and libjpeg-turbo refreshes.
preview_summaries.rc1: The release candidate landed the Skia m148 bump, the singleton lifecycle rework, the SKPaint text/font obsolete-to-error promotion, the SKPixmap/SKBitmap pixel-span fixes, the WinUI Projection DLL fix for .NET 9, and expat 2.8.1.

harfbuzz_summary: Variable-font shaping and the `HBColor` value type ship, missing wrappers fill in, and the bundled HarfBuzz jumps to 14.2.0.
